CustomField.formula: OpenByOwner__c && ($User.Profile_Name__c =='Admin' || $User.Profile_Name__c =='Marketing Manager' || $User.Profile_Name__c =='Zonal Sales Manager' || $User.Profile_Name__c =='Regional Sales Manager' || $User.Profile_Name__c =='System Administrator') && Leave_Status__c =='Leave Approved'
CustomField.label: EditPemissionAfterApproval
